contents.payloadHashMethod: sha256(sorted sha256(path-content) excluding version.json and artifact.json)

notes: Fixed header now reserves flow space on all 59 engineering pages.
Breadcrumb HTML and BreadcrumbList remain synchronized.
Minimum unique inbound donor pages is 6.
Desktop system filters auto-open; mobile filters remain collapsible.
This archive is a source-handoff overlay and is not a directly deployable server bundle.
Deploy only through canonical mosrollout flow; do not rsync --delete.
Canonical .github/workflows/deploy.yml must be preserved by the rollout kit.
description: Исправление навигации после независимого аудита: видимые breadcrumbs, корректный flow-offset шапки, единый DOCTYPE, усиленная перелинковка и доступная горизонтальная навигация.
